jee.title: Engineering Pathway (JEE)
jee.subtitle: Joint Entrance Examination - Gateway to IITs, NITs, and IIITs

colleges.name: IIT Bombay
colleges.details: Top placement packages and startup incubation cell.

colleges.name: IIT Delhi
colleges.details: Superb research environment and technological hub.

colleges.name: IIT Madras
colleges.details: Ranked #1 in NIRF consistently for engineering.

colleges.name: NIT Trichy
colleges.details: Top-tier NIT with exceptional core engineering opportunities.

colleges.name: IIIT Hyderabad
colleges.details: World-class coding culture and research focus.

skillsRequired: Understanding of Physics Laws and Mechanics
opportunities: Core Tech (FAANG, global startups, high-frequency trading)
R&D Labs (ISRO, DRDO, global research institutes)
Higher Studies (MS/PhD in US, Europe, IISc)
Core PSU jobs (ONGC, NTPC, BHEL) via GATE exam

milestones.description: Master NCERT Concepts + standard reference guides (HC Verma, Irodov, Cengage).
Attempt JEE Main (Session 1 in Jan, Session 2 in April) to qualify for NITs and JEE Advanced.
Crack JEE Advanced (May/June) to rank in top 15,000 for IIT Admissions.
Choose branches based on rank list in the centralized counseling portal.

neet.title: Medical & Healthcare Pathway (NEET)
neet.subtitle: National Eligibility cum Entrance Test - Entrance for Medical Schools
degreePaths: MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine & Bachelor of Surgery) - 5.5 Years

colleges.name: AIIMS New Delhi
colleges.details: The absolute pinnacle of medical education and clinical research in India.

colleges.name: JIPMER Puducherry
colleges.details: Premier medical school with excellent infrastructure.

colleges.name: Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC)
colleges.details: Highly clinical patient flow, prestigious legacy.

colleges.name: Armed Forces Medical College (AFMC)
colleges.details: Prepares medical cadets directly for the Indian Armed Forces.

skillsRequired: In-depth rote and understanding of Biological systems
Logical reasoning and Organic Chemistry reaction mechanisms
High empathy, emotional resilience, and stamina
Precision, observation skills, and scientific inquiry
opportunities: Clinical Practice (Private practice or corporate hospitals like Apollo, Max)
Global Medical Career (USMLE for US, PLAB for UK)

milestones.description: Rote learn NCERT Biology line-by-line + practice Chemistry and Physics numericals.
Attempt the 720-mark offline paper in May. Score 620+ for general category government seats.
Participate in AIQ (15%) and State Quota (85%) counseling rounds.
Complete 4.5 years of coursework and 1 year of compulsory rotating internship.

cuet.title: Liberal Arts, Sciences & Commerce Pathway (CUET)
cuet.subtitle: Common University Entrance Test - Gateway to Central Universities
options: Research Scholar in Humanities / Pure Sciences

colleges.name: St. Stephen's College, DU
colleges.details: Top-tier humanities and science college of Delhi University.

colleges.name: SRCC (Shri Ram College of Commerce), DU
colleges.details: India's premier college for Economics and Commerce studies.

colleges.name: Hindu College, DU
colleges.details: Prestigious legacy in arts, commerce, and science courses.

colleges.name: Banaras Hindu University (BHU)
colleges.details: Immense campus with world-class faculty and heritage.

skillsRequired: Critical analysis and synthesis of texts

milestones.description: Perfect the Class 12 NCERT curriculum which matches the CUET syllabus exactly.
Focus on CUET Sections: Section IA/IB (Languages), Section II (Domain Subjects), Section III (General Test).
Take the computer-based exam in May. Maximize marks to clear cutoffs for top colleges.
Apply to individual university portals using CUET scorecard for counseling.

cafoundation.title: Chartered Accountancy Pathway (CA)
cafoundation.subtitle: ICA India - Premium Finance, Audit and Tax Certification
degreePaths: Can be pursued concurrently with B.Com or BBA

colleges.name: ICAI (Institute of Chartered Accountants of India)
colleges.details: The sole body in India authorized to award the CA designation.

skillsRequired: Exemplary Command of Accounting & Auditing Rules
Interpretive capability for Commercial & Taxation laws
Precision in mathematical computations and analysis
opportunities: Big 4 Auditing Firms (Deloitte, EY, KPMG, PwC)
Banking, Investment, and Regulatory Bodies (SEBI, RBI)

milestones.description: Register after Class 10; attempt after Class 12 Boards. Clear 4 papers (Accounting, Law, Math, Economics).
Clear 8 papers divided into 2 groups. Pass marks are 40% per paper, 50% aggregate.
Complete 2 years of mandatory practical training under a practicing Chartered Accountant.
Pass 8 advanced papers and complete mandatory software training to become a member of ICAI.
